messages.content: it depends on the mistakes, it's it's small mistakes I would talk with my colleague in private and communicate my concerns. if it's a serious mistake like stealing I would report it to my manager as soon as possible.  for example, when i worked as a content creator, one of my colleagues was in charge of writing scripts for the video, she was always late for her task. one time i found out that the script she wrote was very similar to another study app. then I talked to her in private, and told her my concerns, like if we have same content we'll lose users. after that she realized her mistakes and decided to put more effect into writing, I also shared my tips on how to write scripts. eventually, she delivered very good content and met our deadline. check grammar
: it should be "put more effort into writing" instead of "put more effect into writing".

Im comfortable to apply makeup to others, acutally I always apply makeup to my mom and friends.
check grammar

The grammar in the sentence is correct! However, to make it perfect, you could add a comma after "others" to separate the sentence into two clauses. So it would be "I'm comfortable to apply makeup to others, actually. I always apply makeup to my mom and friends."

my favorite thing about fashion is that it gives my confidence. I enjoy the process of putting on my make-up and choosing the right cloth to wear. I'd love to hear compliments from my family or friends when they say I like your earrings or I like your makeup.
check grammar

The grammar in the sentence looks fine! However, there are a few suggestions for improvement:

- Instead of saying "it gives my confidence", you could rephrase it as "it makes me feel confident".
- "Putting on my makeup" should be "putting on my makeup" (without "my").
- "Choosing the right cloth to wear" should be "choosing the right clothes to wear".
- Instead of saying "compliments from my family or friends", you could say "compliments from my family and friends".

So the sentence could be rewritten as: "My favorite thing about fashion is that it makes me feel confident. I enjoy the process of putting on makeup and choosing the right clothes to wear. I would love to hear compliments from my family and friends, such as 'I like your earrings' or 'I like your makeup'."

I am aware that estee lauder's reputation... finish sentence
I am aware that Estée Lauder's reputation precedes itself, as it is known globally for producing high-quality and luxurious beauty and skincare products.
what do you know about estee laudder

Estée Lauder is a multinational beauty company that was founded in 1946 by Joseph and Estée Lauder. The company is headquartered in New York and produces and sells makeup, skincare, fragrance, and hair care products. Estée Lauder's brands include Estée Lauder, Clinique, MAC, Bobbi Brown, Aveda, Jo Malone London, Origins, Tom Ford Beauty, and many more. The company is known for its luxurious products and its innovative use of technology in skincare. Estée Lauder is also involved in various social campaigns to empower women and promote breast cancer awareness.
can you give me another answer

Sure! Here's another answer:

Estée Lauder is a major beauty and cosmetics brand that has been around for over 75 years. They are known for producing high-end makeup, skincare, and fragrance products that are sold worldwide. Some of their most well-known products include the Estée Lauder Double Wear Foundation, the Advanced Night Repair Serum, and the Modern Muse fragrance. The company prides itself on innovation and cutting-edge technology, such as their use of 3D printing for cosmetic packaging. In addition to creating beauty products, they have also been involved in various philanthropic efforts, such as supporting gender equality and breast cancer research.

what do you know about Estée Lauder Double Wear Foundation

The Estée Lauder Double Wear Foundation is a popular makeup product that is known for its long-lasting and full-coverage formula. It is designed to stay in place for up to 24 hours, even in high-humidity and heat conditions. The foundation is oil-free, non-acnegenic, and comes in many shades to match various skin tones. It has a matte finish and is buildable, allowing for light to full coverage depending on your preference. The product has received high ratings and positive reviews from customers, who appreciate its excellent coverage and staying power.
what do you know about Advanced Night Repair Serum

The Estée Lauder Advanced Night Repair Serum is a popular skincare product that is designed to repair, hydrate, and restore the skin's natural radiance. It is known for its powerful anti-aging properties and is recommended for use at night as part of a daily skincare routine. The serum is light and fast-absorbing, and it contains a blend of ingredients such as hyaluronic acid, antioxidants, and Estée Lauder's patented ChronoluxCB technology. This technology helps to support the skin's natural repair process and improve overall skin texture, reducing the appearance of fine lines, wrinkles, and other signs of aging. The serum has received high praise from users who report significant improvement in their skin's overall condition, texture, and appearance.
